prompt:
Using REFERENCE_0 and REFERENCE_1 as the outfit design references, create a polished vertical anime character illustration rather than a design sheet. Transform the panda jiangshi swimsuit concept into a single full-body pin-up scene: use the one-piece swimsuit variant as the main base, preserving the glossy black enamel swimsuit, panda motifs, jiangshi paper talisman on the forehead, panda-ear hood/headpiece, detached sheer sleeves, small chains, bows, frills, and panda charms.

Pose and character: Show an original young anime woman wearing the outfit in a confident, slightly coy standing pose, one hand raised near the headpiece and the other lifted loosely at her side. Give her long flowing brown hair and green eyes. Make the body proportions elegant and glamorous, with the swimsuit fitted and reflective.

Scene change: Place her outdoors at night under a huge full moon, with pale cherry blossom branches framing the upper background and drifting petals in the air. Add soft clouds and a cool blue night sky for a dreamy supernatural hanami atmosphere.

Outfit details to include: exactly 6 prominent panda-themed accents visible on the character — 1 panda-face head charm, 2 panda-ear headpiece shapes, 1 small panda print on the chest, 1 small panda print on the lower swimsuit, and 1 panda charm on the thigh garter. Keep the black, white, gray, and navy palette with subtle red/gold on the talisman.

Style: High-quality modern Japanese anime illustration, clean line art, soft cel shading, glossy highlights on the swimsuit, delicate fabric transparency on the sleeves, detailed hair strands, luminous moonlight rim lighting, romantic but spooky-cute mood.

Constraints: Do not recreate the reference sheet layout, labels, diagrams, swatches, or explanatory text. Do not add extra characters. Keep the focus on a single character illustration with the referenced costume faithfully adapted into a finished scene.
